name: failingTest_shouldCaptureScreenshot()
description: This test is designed to fail to demonstrate the automatic screenshot capture feature.
descriptionHtml: This test is designed to fail to demonstrate the automatic screenshot capture feature.
statusMessage: Title should not match, triggering a failure for screenshot. ==> expected: <Wrong Title To Trigger Failure> but was: <Insider One | #1 Platform for AI-Powered Customer Engagement>
